cursor.$description: Cursor on the show/hide toggle wrapper

opacity.$description: Default opacity of the toggle icon

padding-inline.$description: padding-inline of the details slot — was 16px

padding.$description: Padding of the info popup row — was '0 10px'; block=0, inline handled below

padding-inline.$description: Inline padding of the info popup — was 10px; nearest token space.3=12px

padding.$description: Padding of each requirement tile — was 8px

position.$description: Position for the absolute validate checkmark

overflow.$description: Overflow so validate badge is visible outside the tile

icon-opacity.$description: Icon opacity when requirement is satisfied

opacity.$description: Default icon opacity when requirement is not yet satisfied

font-size.$description: Glyph font-size — intentionally larger than font.size.5xl (2.25rem = 36px); kept as literal 45px. Arbitrage: token spécifique retenu, font.size.5xl insuffisant

font-weight.$description: Glyph font-weight — bold makes the character icon visually heavier

position.$description: Checkmark is positioned absolute relative to .origam-password-field__item

top.$description: Top anchor for the validate badge

right.$description: Right anchor for the validate badge

transform.$description: Transform to center the badge on the tile corner

height.$description: Height of each segment of the strength bar (4 segments stacked horizontally) — was 4px

gap.$description: Horizontal gap between strength-bar segments — nearest token, was 2-4px

margin-block-start.$description: Vertical spacing between input bottom and strength bar

border-radius.$description: Pill rounding on each strength segment

bg-empty.$description: Default colour of an empty / not-yet-filled segment — surface.sunken (neutral.50)

bg-weak.$description: Filled colour for level=weak — danger semantic

bg-fair.$description: Filled colour for level=fair — warning semantic

bg-good.$description: Filled colour for level=good — info semantic

bg-strong.$description: Filled colour for level=strong — success semantic

font-size.$description: Font size for each requirement label (list + tiles layout)

gap.$description: Vertical gap between rows in the list layout / both axes in the tiles wrap

margin-block-start.$description: Spacing between strength bar (or input) and the requirements block

icon-size.$description: Size of the check / cross icon next to each requirement label

color-pending.$description: Label colour when the rule is not yet satisfied — text.secondary (neutral.600)

color-satisfied.$description: Label colour when the rule is satisfied
